Two apple trees on municipal park land. Best to harvest before kids throw them around. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Apple tree, not sure what kind. Right next to a mulberry. Corner of parking lot by corner of Salem Five Financial Building. Falling Fruit season: October-October.

Green apple trees (not sure exactly one variety!) Be careful, because I have been (gently) talked to by the Peabody Essex Museum security guards picking here. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-November.
